scenes.narration: Bhai, Cloudflare ke SDE-2 round mein TCP 3-Way Handshake + TLS pe ye trick poochhi jati hai. 30 second sun le.
Without understanding TCP 3-Way Handshake + TLS, systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of TCP 3-Way Handshake + TLS like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of TCP 3-Way Handshake + TLS: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of TCP 3-Way Handshake + TLS: fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use TCP 3-Way Handshake + TLS to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: TCP 3-Way Handshake + TLS solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
